title: cachrys triquetra
intro: Cachrys triquetra, also known as wild celery, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its antiseptic properties, which help to prevent infection. In herbal preparations, Cachrys triquetra is often used as a tea or tincture, and its essential oil is extracted for use in aromatherapy and skincare products.
